'''taboko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kynde|kynde]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-b-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kynde|kynde]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| taboko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæbeketh|tæbeketh]] || [[word:tæbekej|tæbekej]] || [[word:tæbekesh|tæbekesh]] || [[word:tæbeke|tæbeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tabobokoth|tabobokoth]] || [[word:tabobokoj|tabobokoj]] || [[word:tabobokosh|tabobokosh]] || [[word:taboboko|taboboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tabokoth|tabokoth]] || [[word:tabokoj|tabokoj]] || [[word:tabokosh|tabokosh]] || [[word:taboko|taboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tabofkoth|tabofkoth]] || [[word:tabofkoj|tabofkoj]] || [[word:tabofkosh|tabofkosh]] || [[word:tabofkof|tabofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tabokotho|tabokotho]] || [[word:tabokojo|tabokojo]] || [[word:tabokosho|tabokosho]] || [[word:tabokoko|tabokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tabokoth|tabokoth]] || [[word:tabokoj|tabokoj]] || [[word:tabokosh|tabokosh]] || [[word:taboko|taboko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tabokothol|tabokothol]] || [[word:tabokojol|tabokojol]] || [[word:tabokoshol|tabokoshol]] || [[word:tabokokol|tabokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tabokothotho|tabokothotho]] || [[word:tabokojojo|tabokojojo]] || [[word:tabokoshosho|tabokoshosho]] || [[word:tabokoko|tabokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tabokothon|tabokothon]] || [[word:tabokojon|tabokojon]] || [[word:tabokoshon|tabokoshon]] || [[word:tabokokon|tabokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tabokothoro|tabokothoro]] || [[word:tabokojoro|tabokojoro]] || [[word:tabokoshoro|tabokoshoro]] || [[word:tabokokoro|tabokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
